verdict_reason: The doctrinal claims in BG 2.62's engineering layer are consistent with the same-tag verses in the chapter: focus-practice / deep-work doctrine (2.60-2.61, 2.66) holds the consistent position that attention-discipline is ongoing and structural; engineering-pathology doctrine (2.60, 2.62-2.63, 2.66) holds the consistent position that the cascade has direction and intervention is upstream; operator-system-coupling doctrine (2.63, 2.64, 2.65) holds the consistent position that operator-state determines second-order outcomes. Cross-references to 2.60-2.65 in this block (and to 2.47-2.48 in the parallel karma-yoga block) support, rather than contradict, the citing claims. No doctrinal drift. Pass.
